**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Triggering the system-level 'heavy-asset department store' deconstruction and the '1-employee multi-million-level bulk proxy shell' physical demotion probe. This enterprise, named 'Jiangsu Shengjuncheng Industrial,' historically carried highly honest names like 'Kaiyuan Trading' and 'Shengjuncheng Trading.' However, presumably feeling that the word 'trading' couldn't secure large contracts, it rebranded to the prestigious 'Industrial' and forcibly added 'electronic component manufacturing, special equipment manufacturing' to the beginning of its business license. The official system was directly bluffed and forcefully stuffed it into the broad category of 'Power Transmission, Distribution and Control Equipment Manufacturing.' However, the forensic logic engine directly intercepted its fatal flaw: the insured headcount is a pitiful 1 person! But extremely bizarrely, its paid-in capital is a staggering 25 million RMB! Its spatial coordinates are located at 'Office Building A, Room 1-3133, Baguazhou Pioneer Park.' The logical deduction instantly tore apart this disguise of 'heavy-industry enterprise': in 'Room 1-3133' of the pioneer park, an address highly characteristic of virtual affiliation, a single boss dropped 25 million in cash, claiming to have built a production line while simultaneously selling metal ores, petroleum products, food, clothing, shoes, hats, and stationery? The probe mercilessly deleted the word 'manufacturing' used at the beginning to occupy categories, extracting a 'sales/wholesale' list hundreds of words long from the license. The truth is highly shocking and full of the characteristics of China's bulk commodity trading circles: this is a 100% pure 1-Employee Heavy-Capital Universal Trading & Billing Shell. The owner is an extremely powerful capitalist; paying in 25 million is to obtain a very high line of bank credit or to meet the bidding threshold for large state-owned enterprises/municipal procurement. They use this shell to act as a proxy for anything from metal ores, petrochemicals, and electrical cables (bulk trade billing) down to clothing, food, and office supplies. The official 'Power Transmission and Distribution Equipment Manufacturing' tag bestowed upon it is the most thorough dimensional mockery of modern manufacturing.
